metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Web Session ASIM filtering parser for Cisco Umbrella Proxy Logs
properties.query:
let src_or_any = set_union(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix, ipaddr_has_any_prefix);
let dest_or_any = set_union(ipaddr_has_any_prefix, dynamic([]));
let parser = (
    starttime: datetime=datetime(null),
    endtime: datetime=datetime(null),
    srcipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    ipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    url_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    httpuseragent_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    eventresultdetails_in: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    eventresult: string='*',
    disabled: bool=false,
    pack: bool=false) {
    Cisco_Umbrella_proxy_CL
    | where not(disabled)
        and (isnull(starttime) or Timestamp_t >= starttime)
        and (isnull(endtime) or Timestamp_t <= endtime)
        and (array_length(httpuseragent_has_any) == 0 or userAgent_s has_any (httpuseragent_has_any))
        and (array_length(eventresultdetails_in) == 0 or statusCode_s has_any (eventresultdetails_in))
    | extend
      temp_SrcMatch = has_any_ipv4_prefix(Internal_IP_s, src_or_any),
      temp_DstMatch = has_any_ipv4_prefix(Destination_IP_s, dest_or_any)
    | extend ASimMatchingIpAddr = case(
        array_length(src_or_any) == 0, "-",
        temp_SrcMatch and temp_DstMatch, "Both",
        temp_SrcMatch, "SrcIpAddr",
        temp_DstMatch, "DstIpAddr",
        "No match"
    )
    | where ASimMatchingIpAddr != "No match"
    | extend
        EventStartTime = Timestamp_t,
        EventEndTime = Timestamp_t,
        EventSchema = "WebSession",
        EventSchemaVersion = "0.2.7",
        EventType = "HTTPsession",
        EventProduct = "Cisco Umbrella",
        EventVendor = "Cisco",
        EventCount = int(1),
        EventSeverity = "Informational",
        Type = "Cisco_Umbrella_proxy_CL"
    | parse PolicyIdentity_s with * "(" Email ")" *
    | extend
        SrcUsername = coalesce(Email, Policy_Identity_Type_s),
        SrcUsernameType = iff(isnotempty(Email), "UPN", "Simple")
    | project-rename
        SrcIpAddr = Internal_IP_s,
        DvcIpAddr = External_IP_s,
        DstIpAddr = Destination_IP_s,
        HttpContentType = Content_Type_s,
        HttpReferrer = Referer_s,
        HttpUserAgent = userAgent_s,
        EventResultDetails = statusCode_s,
        FileSHA256 = ['SHA-SHA256_s'],
        ThreatOriginalRiskLevel = AMP_Disposition_s
    | extend
        Url = column_ifexists("URL_s", "") 
    | where array_length(url_has_any) == 0 or Url has_any (url_has_any)
    | extend
        Verdict = column_ifexists("Verdict_s", ""),
        HttpRequestMethod = column_ifexists("Request_Method_s", ""),
        RuleName = column_ifexists("Rule_ID_s", ""),
        RuleNumber = toint(column_ifexists("Ruleset_ID_s", "")),
        FileName = column_ifexists("File_Name_s", ""),
        ThreatCategory = tostring(Blocked_Categories_s)
    | extend
        EventResult = case(
            Verdict =~ "Allowed", "Success",
            Verdict =~ "Blocked", "Failure",
            "NA"
        ),
        ThreatRiskLevel = toint(AMP_Score_s),
        HttpRequestBodyBytes = tolong(requestSize_d),
        HttpResponseBodyBytes = tolong(responseBodySize_d),
        DstBytes = tolong(responseSize_d)
    | where (eventresult == '*' or EventResult =~ eventresult)
    | extend
        AdditionalFields = iff(pack, bag_pack(
            "Categories", Categories_s,
            "AVDetections", AVDetections_s,
            "Identities", Identities_s,
            "PolicyIdentityType", Policy_Identity_Type_s), dynamic([]))
    | extend
        HttpStatusCode = EventResultDetails,
        Dst = DstIpAddr,
        Src = SrcIpAddr,
        Dvc = DvcIpAddr,
        IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
        User = SrcUsername,
        Rule = RuleName
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        EventStartTime,
        EventEndTime,
        EventSchema,
        EventSchemaVersion,
        EventType,
        EventProduct,
        EventVendor,
        EventCount,
        EventSeverity,
        Type,
        SrcUsername,
        SrcUsernameType,
        SrcIpAddr,
        DvcIpAddr,
        DstIpAddr,
        HttpContentType,
        HttpReferrer,
        HttpUserAgent,
        EventResultDetails,
        FileSHA256,
        ThreatOriginalRiskLevel,
        Url,
        HttpRequestMethod,
        RuleName,
        RuleNumber,
        FileName,
        ThreatCategory,
        EventResult,
        ThreatRiskLevel,
        HttpRequestBodyBytes,
        HttpResponseBodyBytes,
        DstBytes,
        AdditionalFields,
        HttpStatusCode,
        Dst,
        Src,
        Dvc,
        IpAddr,
        User,
        Rule,
        ASimMatchingIpAddr
};
parser(
  starttime=starttime, 
  endtime=endtime,
  srcipaddr_has_any_prefix=srcipaddr_has_any_prefix,  
  ipaddr_has_any_prefix=ipaddr_has_any_prefix, 
  url_has_any=url_has_any,
  httpuseragent_has_any=httpuseragent_has_any,
  eventresultdetails_in=eventresultdetails_in,
  eventresult=eventresult,
  disabled=disabled,
  pack=pack);
